prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image features a cozy bedroom with a large window that allows natural light to fill the space. In front of this window is a neatly made bed adorned by a colorful comforter. There are two chairs placed within the room; one chair is located near the left side of the bed while another chair can be found closer to the right edge of the frame. Additionally, there's a dining table situated towards the bottom-left corner of the room.

A few other items are present in the room as well. An umbrella rests on the floor close to the center of the room, and a remote control lies nearby. Furthermore, a clock hangs on the wall above the bed, providing a sense of time during relaxation or sleep.
